name: retry_single_1

jobs.prompt:

Steps: parse (extract structure), transform (normalize), validate (check fields), output (format JSON). Return {steps: [{name, status, result}], final_output}. Pure Python.

2. Update surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/DocumentProcessorModule.tsx: add textarea, Process button, call API, show step statuses, write to World.

Write both files.
